bots.name: Pionex Gold Grid Bot
bots.notes: Stable in low-volatility trend; strongest when DXY weakens and real yields cool.

bots.name: BTC Regime Swing Bot
bots.notes: Performance improves when macro liquidity and breadth confirm risk-on.

bots.name: Defense Rotation Bot
bots.notes: Resilient in risk-off windows; lower volatility than broad index strategies.

proposed_changes: Add dynamic ATR band sizing for Gold Grid Bot during policy-event weeks.
Require 3-signal macro confluence before activating BTC high-beta mode.
Introduce time-of-day filter to avoid low-liquidity fills.
Lower leverage cap when US10Y rises above 4.4%.
